emails.subject: Contract Alteration
emails.body: Contract Alteration This is the first of several contracts I need you to alter to make specific between HPL and a third party counterpart, taking out the Enron and its affiliate spin. Please forward your altered draft back to me when completed. Send to SSchneider@aep.com with a copy to MLCarriere@aep.com.
